validators.name: isolated Codex CLI implementation review chain
validators.summary: Iterative review and exact-public-commit follow-up resolved three post-merge recovery findings; the final public implementation review reported no actionable correctness issue.

validators.name: CodeRabbit pull request status context
validators.summary: The status completed successfully, but the service explicitly reported that no review ran because its usage limit was reached. It is not counted as independent validation.

validators.name: immutable public closure candidate review
validators.summary: Protocol v2 requires a separate review of the exact candidate commit after this non-authoritative package is published to main.

themes: publication recovery after external evidence loss

acceptance.criterion: one independently approved task reaches a validated namespaced publication
concurrent or stale authors cannot share delivery authority
worker output cannot widen write, commit, validation, or publication authority
restart recovery uses durable evidence and requires no manual database edits
rollback either demonstrates Sprint 04 compatibility or refuses unsafe history loss
